since_last: 59% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.21%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.55% · BTC -0.35% · Gold +1.13% · Nasdaq100 +1.70%. 59% of 87 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.21%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.21%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.95%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.95%, QCOM +9.01%, TER +7.37%, AMAT +6.66%, VRT +6.66%. Laggards: APP -8.18%, DELL -8.08%, AI -5.15%, AAPL -3.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.63% at $158.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
